mode.label: Zero extra X API
mode.description: Web search links + manual paste replies.

topPosts.text: Google's AI-Declaration ad exposes the real operator pain: AI makes first drafts cheap, but taste becomes the bottleneck.
Decision rule for AI-written copy: use ChatGPT for structure, never for taste.
If a workflow already has clear permissions, logs, and rollback, test Claude Sonnet 5 this week.
Claude Sonnet 5 is not a chatbot launch. It is Anthropic trying to own the coding coworker slot before IDEs become model routers.
AI chip news has one useful test. If Anthropic can move real Claude inference onto Samsung silicon, price cuts get durable.
Claude Fable 5 is back, but don't just flip the switch. Rerun evals, check cost ceilings, review data residency, keep a fallback warm.

actions.label: Target Accounts
actions.reason: Use this first; it borrows distribution from high-signal tech accounts.

actions.label: AI / DevTools
actions.reason: Use this for model launches, coding agents, chips, and AI platform threads.

actions.label: Big Tech / Consumer Tech
actions.reason: Use this for broader tech posts beyond the AI-builder bubble.

drafts.title: AI product launch posts, model demos, agent releases
drafts.text: Launch rule for AI products: demo quality matters less than failure shape. If users can't predict when it will be wrong, support cost becomes the real roadmap.

drafts.title: Big Tech policy changes, app store rules, cloud bundling, ecosystem moves
drafts.text: Platform shift rule: if a Big Tech change can rewrite your margin, roadmap, or distribution overnight, it is not a partnership. It is rented ground with APIs.

drafts.title: Consumer app launches, growth discussions, mobile/social product threads
drafts.text: Consumer app distribution is now a product feature. The best UX loses if onboarding depends on app stores, identity gates, notifications, and algorithmic luck all behaving.

drafts.title: Cloud platform launches, serverless, database, hosting, dev platform posts
drafts.text: Cloud decision rule: optimize for boring exits. If your stack is cheap only while every managed service stays forever, you bought convenience with future negotiation power.

drafts.title: AI coding tools, browser agents, enterprise security, privacy discussions
drafts.text: Security rule for AI tooling: treat every agent with repo, inbox, or browser access like a junior employee with production permissions. Log it, scope it, rotate secrets.

diagnosis: 主贴质量不算差，但小账号阶段缺少初始互动，单独发帖很难被系统分发。
最近 24 小时记录到 3 条推文、8 次曝光；瓶颈是分发入口，不是发帖数量。
当前低成本路线是人工点网页搜索、复制回复，避免增加 X search/read API。
回复优先贴在 2 小时内仍有讨论的大号帖子下面；主贴负责让主页可信。
